proposed_slug.description: A short descriptive name for this new approach/hypothesis.

parent_node.description: The ID of the parent node being branched from.

changed_axes.description: A summary of what parameters or code approaches are being changed compared to the parent.

why_not_duplicate.description: Explanation of why this approach is novel and not a duplicate of past attempts in the registry.

run_argv.description: The command arguments to pass after the -- in run_experiment.sh (e.g. ['torchrun', '--standalone', 'train_gpt.py']).

env_overrides.description: Environment variables to pass to the run_experiment script.

expected_track.description: The track this experiment falls under, e.g. remote or runpod_h100.

success_criteria.description: The conditions under which this run will be considered successful.
